---
name: Research claim review
about: Review or challenge a research note claim
title: "[Claim Review] "
labels: research, evidence
---

## Claim

Link the note and quote the claim being reviewed.

## Evidence

List supporting or conflicting sources, benchmark runs, or simulation artifacts.

## Red-Team Finding

Explain the strongest objection.

## Suggested Status

Choose one: supported, contested, refuted, unverified.
